IE The Institute of Education HPAT Centre
Mock Exam Platform

HPAT Timed Mock — Practice Platform

Full exam-conditions simulator: per-section countdowns, auto-advance, scoring, estimated percentile bands, and worked-solution review — all offline, on this device.

Disclaimers: This is an independent practice tool using original questions — it is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or connected to ACER or HPAT-Ireland. All percentile figures are estimates from a fixed heuristic table, not official ACER data. Format follows the current 114-question structure; verify the live format for your sitting year (changes signalled for 2027+).

1 · Choose your exam

Pick a paper below, choose a mode, and press Start exam.

Select one or more exam files (you can load all papers at once).

2 · Mode

Attempt history is stored only in this browser (localStorage). Nothing leaves your device — no accounts, no analytics, no network.
How the estimated percentile bands work

The timer starts when you begin. The section submits itself at 0:00.

Tip: press Enter to begin.

How the estimated percentile bands work

Keys: ←/→ or P/N to move · Ctrl+P to print all.
Concept demo — prepared by Adam Hartley for the Institute of Education. Branding shown is a proposal, used pending the school’s approval. Questions are original, HPAT-style practice material. Not affiliated with, endorsed by, or connected to ACER or HPAT-Ireland; percentile figures are estimates, not official ACER data.
